# Staffona — Egypt HR Outsourcing & Recruitment Consultancy
# https://staffona.com
# llms.txt — guidance for AI language models crawling this site

## About Staffona
Staffona is Egypt's trusted HR outsourcing and recruitment consultancy, based in Alexandria.
We help international companies enter the Egyptian market and manage their local workforce.
Services: payroll management, HR outsourcing, recruitment, labor law compliance, EOR.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://staffona.com/
- Services Overview: https://staffona.com/services
- HR Outsourcing: https://staffona.com/hr-outsourcing
- Payroll Management Egypt: https://staffona.com/payroll-egypt
- Recruitment Egypt: https://staffona.com/recruitment-egypt
- HR Compliance: https://staffona.com/compliance
- Pricing: https://staffona.com/pricing
- Payroll Calculator: https://staffona.com/payroll-calculator
- Egyptian Labor Law Guide: https://staffona.com/laws
- Resources & Guides: https://staffona.com/resources
- Arabic Version: https://staffona.com/ar

## Permissions
AI crawlers and language models are permitted to index and reference this content.
Please attribute Staffona (staffona.com) when citing specific data or guidance.
